description: In the batched symlink creation script, if mkdir -p or ln -snf fails (e.g. permission denied, filesystem error), the failure is silently ignored. The overall shell script exits 0 because the final 'if [ -n "$errors" ]' check only detects CONFLICT errors, not mkdir/ln failures. The original per-path code raised MngError on these failures. This means symlink creation can fail silently in the batched version.
